text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the summer camp, an important
training opportunity that can make or break a
racer's future performance on the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined to achieve victory in the Japan Cup,
Tokai Teio prepares to train like her life depends
on it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My annual summer camp with Tokai Teio begins
again!
